zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Despenser於1397年出生在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，她的父親Phillip Spencer32歲，母親Elizabeth Tibetot27歲。她於1404年9月13日之後與Sir John de Ros Knt.結婚。她去世於1478年4月20日在她的家鄉享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Despenser was born in 1397, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, her father, Phillip Spencer, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Tibetot, was 27. She married Sir John de Ros Knt. after 13 September 1404. She died on 20 April 1478, in her hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Despenser est née en 1397, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Phillip Spencer, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tibetot, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Ros Knt. après 13 septembre 1404. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Despenser 1397 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Phillip Spencer 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Tibetot 27. Sie hat nach 13. September 1404 Sir John de Ros Knt. geheiratet. Sie starb am 20. April 1478 im Alter von 81 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Despenser è nata il nel 1397 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Phillip Spencer, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Tibetot, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Ros Knt. dopo il 13 settembre 1404. Morì il 20 aprile 1478, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Despenser nasceu em 1397, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Phillip Spencer, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tibetot, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Ros Knt. após 13 de setembro de 1404. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1478, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Despenser родилась в 1397 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Phillip Spencer было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tibetot, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Ros Knt. после 13 сентябрь 1404 г. Она умерла 20 апреля 1478 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 81 год.

Se casó con Sir John de Ros Knt. después de 13 de septiembre de 1404. Murió el 20 de abril de 1478, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años.
